name: mountain
description: High altitude terrain for scaling the world's peaks.

templates.name: Mountain Side
templates.description: A steeply inclining path winding up the side of the mountain. Stones tumble away with every step.

templates.name: High Summit
templates.description: The air begins to thin here as the path narrows. The world below looks like a distant map.

templates.name: The Peak
templates.description: The absolute apex of the mountain. The wind howls with ferocity, and the cold is soul-piercing.

templates.name: Cliffside
templates.description: A patch of hardy grass clings to the edge of a sheer drop. The sound of water echoes from below.
